Description: Reminder feature fixed, /version command, /location command, few visual changes
Fee split based on IN list, minor notification error fixes, server timezone fixes, critical roll call end fix
Major release with Docker support and DB foundation
Major release with SQLite/PostgreSQL support and UI/UX overhaul
Stats enabled for real users only, user order and proxy panel fixes
Templates for quick roll call creation, end confirmation message
Major ordering revamp, stats collection for future insights, minor bug fixes
Dupcheck removed, deleteuser supports username, OpenClaw+Claude prompt support
Logging enhanced, @none tag fix, UI/UX improvements
Bug fixes & security hardening: improved error handling for /version and broadcast commands, fixed proxy owner data loss, safer username and limit handling, errors now properly logged
Resolve set_location UnboundLocalError and add handler tests
Use GH_PAT for version bump push to bypass branch protection

Major release: Ghost Tracking feature. Bot now tracks session no-shows per user. After /erc, organiser is asked if anyone ghosted — tap to select from the IN list. Repeat ghosts get a reconfirmation prompt when voting IN again. New commands: /absent_stats (public leaderboard), /set_absent_limit, /mark_absent, /clear_absent, /toggle_ghost_tracking. Ghost tracking is enabled by default with a limit of 1 missed session.
Ghost Tracking — session no-show tracking with reconfirmation (v5.0)
Ghost Tracking — fix proxy user (/sif) ghost count tracking and support /stats ghost, /clear_absent commands for proxy users

Ghost feature fixes: absent_limit threshold now correctly loaded from DB on restart (cache key mismatch), ghost prompt now fires on panel end (btn_endconfirm) not just /erc command, ghost selections restored from DB on bot restart preventing silent data loss
